name: Intrepid Broadband Communication Company
notes:
Intrepid Broadband Communication and associate companies specialize in providing high quality cable and broadband internet services throughout major locations spread across Dhaka city. Being one of the first providers of internet and cable in the district, we have evolved over time to provide the best possible services with cutting edge technology to meet the growing demands of our customers.

In hopes of a better future towards a true "Digital Bangladesh", we strive every day to provide our users with a better experience.
